description: default export with manual method routing
named handler exports per HTTP method
missing force-dynamic on session-dependent endpoint
force-dynamic prevents stale cached responses
leaks server secret in JSON response
secret used server-side only, never returned
raw Response without explicit status or content type
NextResponse.json with explicit status code

ruleTitle: Async Performance — Start Early, Await Late
description: serial awaits — config waits for auth, data waits for both

ruleTitle: Async Performance — Start Early, Await Late
description: auth and config start immediately, dependent calls parallelized
validation, DB queries, hashing, email all inline in handler
handler delegates to extracted lib modules
awaits expensive work even when the request returns early
defers the expensive await until the branch that actually needs it

ruleTitle: Use after() for Non-Blocking Side Effects
description: audit logging blocks the main response path

ruleTitle: Use after() for Non-Blocking Side Effects
description: non-critical audit logging is deferred with after()

ruleTitle: Hoist Static I/O to Module Scope
description: static file is re-read on every request

ruleTitle: Hoist Static I/O to Module Scope
description: static file read starts once at module load instead of once per request

ruleTitle: Await cookies() and headers() in Next.js 16
description: uses the async cookies() API like the older synchronous API

ruleTitle: Await cookies() and headers() in Next.js 16
